title: AgentLoopDecisionEnvelope
description: Machine envelope for planner-loop semantic decisions. It records whether the planner's first actionable step is to respond, clarify, call a capability, or synthesize an answer. Runtime must not parse user natural-language text to populate this shape.

semantic_authority.description: Layer that owns the semantic decision envelope.

terminal_intent.description: Stable terminal/continuation intent derived from the planner-loop decision. This is machine state, not a rendered user reply.

control_intent.description: Stable loop-control token explaining whether this round should answer, clarify, act, recover, wait, or stop.

control_reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code for the loop-control token.

reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code for the shadow decision.

clarify_reason_code.description: Stable machine reason for clarify terminal intent. Null for non-clarify decisions.

validation_reason_code.description: Stable machine reason code produced by the shadow decision validator.

missing_slot.description: Primary missing slot when terminal_intent=clarify; null when no structured slot is missing.

capability_ref.description: Capability, tool, or skill ref selected by the first planner action.

evidence_needed.description: Evidence fields still required by the task contract before a trustworthy final answer.

answer_shape.description: Machine final-answer shape token from the contract matrix or coarse output shape fallback.

message_key.description: Optional i18n message key for downstream finalizer or language policy rendering.

field_path.description: Optional structured field path attached to a clarify terminal intent.

locator_kind.description: Optional machine locator kind attached to a clarify terminal intent.
